# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: istio-ingressgateway-external-access
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # use Istio default gateway implementation
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: istio-ingressgateway-external-access
spec:
  gateways:
  - istio-ingressgateway-external-access # use Istio default gateway implementation
  hosts:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 80
      uri:
        prefix: /
    route:
    - destination:
        host: external-service.default.svc.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-service
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-service.default.svc.cluster.local # use Istio default gateway implementation
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
